name: topos-vscode
description: Install Topos MCP code-quality tools for VS Code agent mode.

topos.executablePath.description: Custom path to the Topos CLI executable.

topos.autoDiscover.description: Automatically discover Topos CLI in the active Python virtual environment.

topos.autoDownload.description: Download and verify the standalone Topos binary when no bundled, cached, or local installation is found.

scripts.compile: npm run check-types && npm run lint && node esbuild.js
scripts.watch: npm run check-types && npm run lint && node esbuild.js --watch
scripts.package: npm run check-types && npm run lint && node esbuild.js --production
scripts.package:darwin-arm64: npm run package && npm run stage:binary -- darwin-arm64 && npx --yes @vscode/vsce package --target darwin-arm64 --out topos-vscode-darwin-arm64.vsix && npm run stage:binary:clean
scripts.package:darwin-x64: npm run package && npm run stage:binary -- darwin-x64 && npx --yes @vscode/vsce package --target darwin-x64 --out topos-vscode-darwin-x64.vsix && npm run stage:binary:clean
scripts.package:linux-arm64: npm run package && npm run stage:binary -- linux-arm64 && npx --yes @vscode/vsce package --target linux-arm64 --out topos-vscode-linux-arm64.vsix && npm run stage:binary:clean
scripts.package:linux-x64: npm run package && npm run stage:binary -- linux-x64 && npx --yes @vscode/vsce package --target linux-x64 --out topos-vscode-linux-x64.vsix && npm run stage:binary:clean
scripts.publish:targets: npx --yes @vscode/vsce publish --target darwin-arm64 darwin-x64 linux-arm64 linux-x64
